airbnb-seed-2009/slide_01:
```
TYPE: title slide / cover slide
DESCRIPTION: Large logo dominates the center of the slide, positioned in the upper-middle area with a single-line subtitle below it. A small heading anchors the top-left and a slide number anchors the top-right. Generous whitespace fills the lower half of the slide, with contact information in a small footer at the bottom.
ELEMENTS: heading, logo, subtitle, slide number, footer text
FLOW: top-down
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_02:
```
TYPE: title + body statements
DESCRIPTION: Large section title anchors top-left with corresponding slide number top-right. Below spans a prominent white rounded-rectangle content box containing three vertically-stacked text statements, each with emphasized keywords followed by lighter body text. Generous whitespace surrounds the content area; footer sits at bottom edge. Reading flow is top-down, centered on the main content block.
ELEMENTS: section title, slide number, white content container, three text statement blocks (with emphasis-weight variation), footer
FLOW: top-down
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_03:
```
TYPE: title + descriptive header + three-column card grid
DESCRIPTION: Large heading positioned top-left with slide number in top-right corner. Descriptive introductory text spans full width below the heading in a white container. Three equal-width cards with rounded corners arranged horizontally in the center area, evenly spaced with consistent gutters. Heavy whitespace below the card row and footer text anchored at bottom of the slide.
ELEMENTS: title, slide number, descriptive text block, three identical card blocks (primary text + secondary text each), footer text
FLOW: top-down then left-right (title → description → left-to-right card progression)
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_04:
```
TYPE: two-column metric comparison
DESCRIPTION: Large heading anchors the top-left with a slide number badge in the top-right. A full-width white rounded container dominates the center with a symmetric two-column layout: each column presents a small label text at top, a large metric number centered, and smaller supporting text below. The layout is highly spacious with substantial whitespace. A footnote sits at bottom-left of the container.
ELEMENTS: heading, slide number badge, white rounded container, left column (label, metric, supporting text), right column (label, metric, supporting text), footnote, footer bar
FLOW: top-down with left-right symmetry
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_05:
```
TYPE: Three-column bubble comparison (size hierarchy)
DESCRIPTION: Large title anchors top-left with slide number opposite. Three progressively smaller circles arrange horizontally across the content area, each centered above its own label and supporting text below. Heavy visual mass concentrates on the left, tapering rightward. Ample whitespace surrounds the circle cluster. Bottom footer spans full width.
ELEMENTS: Heading, slide number badge, three circles (decreasing size), labels, source attribution text, footer
FLOW: left-right (circles decrease in size), top-down (title → circles → labels → footer)
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_06:
```
TYPE: product-flow-showcase
DESCRIPTION: A horizontal process flow with three labels sits above three stacked mockup screenshots arranged in a left-to-right cascading overlap. The mockups are the dominant visual mass, sized progressively and layered diagonally across the lower two-thirds of the slide. Title and slide number anchor the top corners. Generous whitespace on left and bottom grounds the composition.
ELEMENTS: title, slide-number, process-flow-labels, three-screenshot-mockups, whitespace
FLOW: top-down
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_07:
```
TYPE: Title + explanatory text + three-column metric flow diagram
DESCRIPTION: A centered slide with title anchoring top-left and slide number top-right. Below, a single line of explanatory text spans the width. The main content is a horizontal flow: a large orange circle containing the first metric (left), connected by arrows to two additional large metric values (center and right). Each column has a label and supporting details beneath. Generous whitespace surrounds the central diagram.
ELEMENTS: title heading, slide number, body text, circular shape, numeric values, column labels, supporting text, directional arrows, footer
FLOW: left-right
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_08:
```
TYPE: three-column layout with header
DESCRIPTION: Full-width title at top left with slide number top right anchors the layout. Three equal-width columns below contain distinct content: a list with small text table on the left, logo cluster in the center, and a large website screenshot on the right. Moderate spacing between columns. Reading flows top-down then left-to-right across the three sections. Light background provides whitespace framing.
ELEMENTS: heading, slide number, three column headers, small text list, logo cluster, website screenshot, footer text
FLOW: top-down then left-right
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_09:
```
TYPE: Competitive positioning matrix / quadrant analysis
DESCRIPTION: A 2x2 matrix dominates the slide center, with two intersecting axes (vertical: affordable-to-expensive, horizontal: offline-to-online transaction) creating four quadrants. Competitor logos are distributed across quadrants based on their positioning along these dimensions. Axis labels and directional arrows clearly mark each dimension, with the matrix contained in a large white background area. Title spans full width at top.
ELEMENTS: title, slide-number, vertical-axis, horizontal-axis, directional-arrows, axis-labels, competitor-logos, white-background-container
FLOW: center-out
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_10:
```
TYPE: Feature grid (2×3 layout)
DESCRIPTION: A title with slide number anchors the top; the primary content is a balanced 2-row, 3-column grid of blue header boxes with supporting text below each, centered in a generous whitespace area. The layout is highly structured and symmetrical, with even distribution of visual weight across the grid elements.
ELEMENTS: heading, slide number, 6 blue header boxes, 6 supporting text blocks, background, footer text
FLOW: top-down to grid, then left-right row-by-row
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_11:
TYPE: Team roster / Profile cards
DESCRIPTION: A single-column vertical list of team member profiles dominates the center-left of the slide, with each profile containing a small circular headshot image on the left, followed by a name, job title, and brief biographical text stacked vertically. A header with left-aligned title and right-aligned slide number sits at the top. A small footer attribution appears at the bottom. The layout emphasizes linear top-to-bottom reading with consistent spacing between profile entries and generous left/right margins.
ELEMENTS: page title, slide number, team member profile card (headshot image, name, title, bio text), 3x repeated, footer attribution text
FLOW: top-down
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_12:
```

DESCRIPTION: A section title spans the top-left of the slide with a centered number in the top-right. Four quoted testimonials in speech bubbles are arranged horizontally in the upper portion of a large white content block, followed below by four brand logos evenly spaced in a single row with website URLs underneath each. Generous whitespace separates the quotes from the logos and fills the lower half of the content area.
ELEMENTS: section heading, slide number, speech bubble quotes (×4), brand logos (×4), URLs (×4), footer text
FLOW: top-down, left-right
```
airbnb-seed-2009/slide_13:

Below sits a balanced 2x2 grid of testimonial cards, each combining a portrait photo with accompanying quoted text in pink, positioned above or beside the image. The layout distributes visual weight evenly across four cells with consistent spacing and rhythm.
ELEMENTS: heading, slide number, 4 portrait photos, 4 quote text blocks
FLOW: top-down, then row-by-row left-to-right
```

Generous whitespace separates the columns and surrounds the layout.

The lower zone mirrors this structure with a large heading followed by body text, all center-aligned. Visual weight is distributed evenly between the two sections with significant vertical breathing room throughout.
ELEMENTS: heading, subheading, body text, icon toolbar with button cluster
FLOW: top-down
```
